- `~/.claude/projects/D--work-wordworld/` = `C:\Users\Administrator\.claude\projects\D--work-wordworld\`

And the persistent memory path from the claude-mem system is:
- `C:\Users\Administrator\.claude\projects\D--work-wordworld\memory\` - this is the Claude persistent memory

The memory directory at `~/.claude/projects/D--work-wordworld/memory/` should also be part of the junction. Let me move it.

2. Remove the old directory
